title: What's new in Google Cloud's agent platform
summary: Google Cloud announced upgrades to its agent platform including Agent Builder with no-code/low-code Designer, Agent Registry for reusable components, unified governance with time-travel debugging, and an Agent Development Kit. The platform provides enterprise-grade tools for building, scaling, and managing multi-agent workflows.
writeup: This video covers upgrades to Google Cloud's agent platform, centered on Agent Builder with a no-code/low-code Designer, an Agent Registry for reusable components, unified governance, and an Agent Development Kit. The components target enterprise needs for building, scaling, and managing multi-agent workflows. Notable additions include time-travel debugging and observability tooling intended to make agent behavior inspectable and traceable.
